message:
fix(distributed/assignment): simplify SymbolAssigner tie-breaking to use count alone

Remove the tertiary index-based tie-breaker from the assignment candidate
selection loop. When two candidates have equal projected totals and equal
assigned counts, the previous code preferred the lower index — but this
introduced a deterministic bias toward early-indexed regions regardless of
actual load distribution. With the tie-breaker removed, candidates with
identical projected totals are distinguished solely by assigned count,
which more accurately reflects real load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
